user.title: RWB1 Solar DTU (local MQTT)
user.description: Connect to the RWB1 dongle through your own MQTT broker. Point the dongle's DNS for `hongkong.broker.mqtt.solar.siseli.com` at this broker first (see the README).

data.username: MQTT username (defaults to the DTU number)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the MQTT broker. Check the host, port, and credentials.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
